name: claude.ai Figma
description: Figma MCP server — provides access to design files, component specs, and design context.
setup_instructions:
1. Go to Claude settings > MCP Servers
2. Click 'Add MCP Server'
3. Name: claude.ai Figma
4. Type: HTTP
5. URL: https://mcp.figma.com/v1/mcp
6. Authenticate with your Figma account when prompted
